summary: Web app project with a custom homepage design (no 'vapor v4' branding) and a navigation bar accessible from a home icon that links to all pages.

existing_features.title: Create a new HomePage component styled after the reference screenshot: a full-screen dark purple gradient background (deep near-black purple at edges, slightly lighter/glowing purple in the center), with a live clock and temperature-style widget centered at the top (reuse ClockWidget), a large centered brand title using a gradient text effect (fading from dark purple/dim to bright white, similar to the reference but using the app's own name — 'Cheetah' or 'CHEETAH PROXY' — instead of 'VAPOR v4'), a subtle tagline below the title in muted gray text, and a version/Discord-style info line at the bottom center.

Add a home icon button fixed to the bottom-left corner of the screen (matching the reference screenshot's bottom-left home icon position). Clicking the home icon opens a navigation drawer or overlay panel that lists links to ALL pages/sections of the app: Home, Proxy/Browser, Games, Search, and any other existing pages. Clicking a nav link navigates to that page and closes the panel.

Integrate the new HomePage as the default landing view inside BrowserLayout (or as a new top-level route). When a new tab is opened or the app first loads, show the HomePage instead of a blank/empty state. The existing proxy, search, and games views remain accessible via navigation.

new_feature_requests.summary: Custom homepage design without 'vapor v4' branding, with a home icon that opens a navigation bar linking to all pages
